case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. PARKER, NINA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE (SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM TO RIGHT OF POSSESSION) SERVED ON ALL OCCUPANTS BY SERVING NINA PARKER; TENANT ON 8-31-95 FILED BY PLTF.

09:27AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. ALLYCE KIMMERLING FOR THE PLTF AND NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFT. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT, TERMS ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKER, NINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 BLYTHDALE AVENUE, S.F. $2,664.97 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,664.97, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS THROUGH COST BILL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, NINA
